title: What would you do in Shinjis place in EoE
display_title: What would you do in Shinjis place in EoE
wikitext:
[]: What would you do in Shinji's place in EoE?             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Thu Jun 26, 2008 10:18 am As above. Personally, I'd bring the rest of the world back to life and not just myself (and Asuka?)

[]: Re: What would you do in Shinji's place in EoE?             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jun 26, 2008 10:50 am AyrYntake wrote: As above. Personally, I'd bring the rest of the world back to life and not just myself (and Asuka?)

[]: Re: What would you do in Shinji's place in EoE?             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Thu Jun 26, 2008 10:57 am AyrYntake wrote: As above. Personally, I'd bring the rest of the world back to life and not just myself (and Asuka?)

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Thu Jun 26, 2008 11:49 am Completely lose my shit and panic.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Jun 26, 2008 12:23 pm so you would be just like Shinji I'd grobe Rei's breasts in LCL ocean just kiddin' I'd go out kick some harpy ass yo

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Thu Jun 26, 2008 1:03 pm Xard wrote: I'd go out kick some harpy ass yo

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Thu Jun 26, 2008 1:12 pm http://www.evamade.net/e107_files/public/1213987736_37_FT144081_1213977857039.jpg This^

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Thu Jun 26, 2008 1:20 pm Xard wrote: I'd go out kick some harpy ass yo

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jun 26, 2008 1:28 pm Gamer_2k4 wrote: Xard wrote: I'd go out kick some harpy ass yo

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Thu Jun 26, 2008 1:46 pm Ornette wrote: Gamer_2k4 wrote: Xard wrote: I'd go out kick some harpy ass yo

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Jun 26, 2008 2:10 pm You do realize if you stop the Harpies you'll have nukes coming at you right? The Prime Minister isn't gonna just sit there if that happened.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Thu Jun 26, 2008 2:21 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: You do realize if you stop the Harpies you'll have nukes coming at you right? The Prime Minister isn't gonna just sit there if that happened.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Jun 26, 2008 2:41 pm Except WMD do matter. Everyone not in an Eva would die. There is even a chance if the yield is high enough their ATF's would be pierced. It isn't a battle that could be won.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Jun 26, 2008 3:44 pm Ornette wrote: Gamer_2k4 wrote: Xard wrote: I'd go out kick some harpy ass yo

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Jun 26, 2008 3:53 pm Really? N^2 mines have been shown to pierce the Angels AFTs, you think high yield nukes can't? It may not destroy them but they'd be damaged and the pilots would be in bad shape. SEELE framed the battle as a have to win, fate of the world situation and accordingly the Japanese PM would throw anything he's got a NERV to stop them. Hell, SEELE could send in all the UN forces if it came to it.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Jun 26, 2008 3:58 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Really? N^2 mines have been shown to pierce the Angels AFTs, you think high yield nukes can't? It may not destroy them but they'd be damaged and the pilots would be in bad shape. SEELE framed the battle as a have to win, fate of the world situation and accordingly the Japanese PM would throw anything he's got a NERV to stop them. Hell, SEELE could send in all the UN forces if it came to it.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Thu Jun 26, 2008 3:59 pm Xard wrote: It would've been entirely possible if Shinji hadn't be catatonic rag of human being. If he had left for cages when he was ment to (and Misato presumed) he would've made it. Battle against Harpies was entirely winnable and would've been won if Eva-01 would've entered.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Jun 26, 2008 4:02 pm Ironfoot wrote: Xard wrote: It would've been entirely possible if Shinji hadn't be catatonic rag of human being. If he had left for cages when he was ment to (and Misato presumed) he would've made it. Battle against Harpies was entirely winnable and would've been won if Eva-01 would've entered.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Jun 26, 2008 4:06 pm Xard wrote: Besides there isn't difference between N2's and nuclear weapon's firepower. Jet Alone had freakin' nuclear reactor in it and Eva-01 would've survived just fine. Combining two Eva AT-Fields would've been nigh-unpenetrable.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Jun 26, 2008 4:10 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Xard wrote: Besides there isn't difference between N2's and nuclear weapon's firepower. Jet Alone had freakin' nuclear reactor in it and Eva-01 would've survived just fine. Combining two Eva AT-Fields would've been nigh-unpenetrable.
